crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Shrimp exports to cross Rs 50,000 crore this fiscal, volume to improve
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: India’s shrimp exports are set to exceed Rs 50,000 crore this fiscal—up 13-15% on-year after three years of stagnation—shaking off steep United States (US) tariffs by deftly engaging with, and shipping to, other markets.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: 16th Finance Commission proposals long-term positive for states
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: The 16th Finance Commission’s (FC) emphasis to reduce mounting revenue deficits and undertake growth-oriented capital outlays augurs well for states’ fiscal health in the long term. In the near term, however, constraints persist with limited incremental fiscal support for states.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Profitability of gold-loan NBFCs to remain healthy at ~4.25-4.5% this and next fiscal
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: Non-banking financial companies (NBFCs)  specialising in gold loans are expected to see their already healthy profitability rising in the medium term with average return on managed assets (RoMA) estimated in the range of ~4.25-4.5% through this and next fiscal (refer to chart in annexure).

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Healthy occupancy, rising realisations to drive 14-15% growth in private hospitals
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: Private hospitals will grow ~14-15% in fiscal 2027, supported by healthy occupancy and ongoing bed additions, with new facilities ramping up faster. icici-bank-research.title: India Trade: Goods deficit widened, services surplus improved
icici-bank-research.description: India’s goods exports were more or less same as last year at USD 36.6bn in Jan 2026 even as oil exports rose (8.7% YoY). icici-bank-research.title: State Finances: Revex moderation amidst SGST slowdown
icici-bank-research.description: Analysed finances of 24 states accounting for ~94% of India’s GDP. Our analysis shows that during Apr-Dec FY26, our sample states’ revenue receipts growth decelerated to 7.1% YoY vs 10.6% YoY last year mainly due to slower growth in SGST collections. icici-bank-research.title: Morning Market Starter

icici-bank-research.title: Chartbook: India’s growth looking upwards after trade agreements
icici-bank-research.description: India’s economic policy is witnessing a change in direction with two large trade deals with EU and US which are India's two largest trading partners. crisil-research.description: A US-based private equity firm sought to maximize the value of two recently acquired hospitals, purchased in partnership with a major Indian healthcare provider. The primary objective was to enhance operational efficiency, strengthen financial performance and establish a scalable foundation to suppo

crisil-research.title: Real estate portfolio company elevates performance measurement with 30% faster reporting
crisil-research.description: The organization faced challenges in effectively measuring and reporting the performance of its real estate portfolio because of fragmented data, multiple stakeholders requiring customized reporting, and the absence of real time analytics needed for informed investment decisions and a quick response

crisil-research.title: Navigating OSFI’s Revised E-23: Implications, challenges and mitigation strategies
crisil-research.description: OSFI's E-23 introduces significant changes for federally regulated financial institutions (FRFIs) in Canada. E-23 calls for an enterprise-wide perspective and a governance framework that aligns oversight with each model's importance.

crisil-research.title: US bank M&As: Model risk management and regulatory strategy
crisil-research.description: United States (US) banks announced 124 merger and acquisition (M&A) deals in 2025. Several of these were among the largest bank acquisitions on record, reflecting renewed industry confidence.

baroda-etrade-str.description: Assuming current AI trends stay, value migration is seen to AI model developers and semiconductor players. Not sure if this is structural

baroda-etrade-str.title: Cement: Q3FY26 Review – Robust volume gains; GST rate cut weakens prices, caps gains

baroda-etrade-str.title: Automobiles: Q3FY26 Review – Soft rates aid solid volume; cost headwinds a mild dampener
baroda-etrade-str.description: Strong overall volume growth of ~18% YoY solidifying the structural revival of the Automobiles sector, over and above the festive demand

ssga-insights.title: The retirement proving ground
ssga-insights.description: The “4% rule” has long been the go-to approach for drawing down income in retirement. But can one “rule” really apply to everyone? We look at some hypothetical examples to test out retirement income strategies.

ssga-insights.title: The Gulf shock: Energy supply, markets, and macro spillovers
ssga-insights.description: Oil has risen as expected, but disruption is spreading from Hormuz transport bottlenecks to energy production, deepening risk-off sentiment.

ssga-insights.title: February payroll shock flags AI job loss risk
ssga-insights.description: Renewed US labor market weakness, cautious central banks, and geopolitical risks shape this week’s outlook, with AI disruption and energy prices in sharp focus.

ssga-insights.title: Nature and biodiversity: investor objectives for risk and opportunity
ssga-insights.description: This article examines two nature and biodiversity objectives for investors: mitigating dependency risks and investing in companies addressing biodiversity loss.

ssga-insights.title: China’s market disconnect
ssga-insights.description: China’s equity performance continues to diverge from emerging markets as policy uncertainty and structural challenges weigh on returns.

ssga-insights.title: SAFI turns 2: Delivering consistent alpha, controlled risk
ssga-insights.description: SAFI celebrates 2 years of disciplined, factor-driven fixed income investing with strong, consistent performance and robust risk management for clients.

ssga-insights.title: Markets send the signals—ETF flows show where investors are headed
ssga-insights.description: In a market flooded with signs, ETF flows reveal how investors are interpreting signals and positioning portfolios amid uncertainty.

ssga-insights.title: Private markets: Survey explores perceptions among plan sponsors and participants
ssga-insights.description: Danielle Gladstone delves into the perceptions among plan sponsors and participants gathered from State Street Investment Management’s private markets survey.

ssga-insights.title: Monthly Cash Review – USD
ssga-insights.description: US cash markets remain stable as the Fed signals patience, liquidity stays ample, and front-end volatility reflects headlines more than policy shifts.

ssga-insights.title: Private markets: The diversification imperative
ssga-insights.description: Brendan Curran talks about the importance of considering the introduction of private markets into target date portfolios to capture evolving market dynamics.

ssga-insights.title: Private markets: Addressing liquidity concerns
ssga-insights.description: Dan Farley details how we address meeting liquidity needs when introducing private markets to target date funds.

ssga-insights.title: The power of information ratio (IR) in active management
ssga-insights.description: See why the information ratio is a key metric in manager evaluation—and how it shows whether active risk is being used efficiently.

ssga-insights.title: Are yields entering a new phase?
ssga-insights.description: Long-dated sovereign yields test historic thresholds, raising questions about regime shifts across Gilts, JGBs, and Treasuries.

ssga-insights.title: US industry shows signs of revival
ssga-insights.description: A gradual revival in US industry, resilient Canadian demand, and persistent Australian inflation define this week’s global macroeconomic outlook.

ssga-insights.title: Capturing opportunity as the equity landscape evolves
ssga-insights.description: AI stocks may dominate, but market dispersion is broadening, offering potential reward for active investors who look beyond headline trends for opportunities.

ssga-insights.title: The All Weather portfolio: Built for any forecast
ssga-insights.description: Markets are unpredictable, but an All Weather portfolio approach is built to prepare for a wide range of economic environments. Explore how it can help you build a more resilient portfolio for the long term.

ssga-insights.title: How should I add thematic investments to portfolios?
ssga-insights.description: Navigate today's dynamic market and help your clients achieve their goals with From the Field, a monthly series where our strategists answer timely questions from advisors like you.

ssga-insights.title: The value of dividend growth strategies to portfolios today and beyond
ssga-insights.description: In times of uncertainty, pivoting away from concentration and leveraging the stability of a dividend growth strategy with SDY can potentially help investors reduce the impact of volatility.

ssga-insights.title: How economic factors impact asset performance
ssga-insights.description: Learn how economic forces uniquely impact different asset classes. Uncover why macroeconomic-environmental diversification, not just asset class diversification, may help build wealth over the long-term.

ssga-insights.title: ALLW brings Bridgewater’s All Weather wisdom to ETF investors
ssga-insights.description: Learn how ALLW applies Bridgewater’s All Weather approach with the goal of compounding capital through various types of economic weather.

ssga-insights.title: USD to stabilize; JPY unresponsive to BoJ
ssga-insights.description: USD stabilizes in the near term despite policy uncertainty, while BoJ actions fail to spark a sustained recovery in the yen.

ssga-insights.title: Build an active bond ladder with State Street® MyIncome ETFs
ssga-insights.description: Learn more about actively managed target maturity ETFs and how they can help investors build more effective bond ladders.

ssga-insights.title: US real GDP cools sharply in Q4 2025
ssga-insights.description: Economic momentum softened into year-end in the US, UK data supports a March rate cut, and Japan’s macro signals strengthen, pointing to uneven global growth ahead.

ssga-insights.title: India IT adapts to the AI shift
ssga-insights.description: India’s IT sector adapts to the AI shift as margins compress, delivery models evolve, and firms reset for sustainable growth.

ssga-insights.title: Private markets: The role of public policy
ssga-insights.description: Melissa Kahn breaks down how legislative actions are paving the way for DC plans to tap into the changing landscape surrounding private markets allocations.

ssga-insights.title: Supreme Court IEEPA tariff decision could raise market risk
ssga-insights.description: The Supreme Court’s IEEPA ruling curbs emergency tariffs, but policy risk hasn’t fallen—it has shifted, concentrating market uncertainty at sector and company levels.

ssga-insights.title: Inside the mind of the retail investor
ssga-insights.description: This exclusive report explores the money habits of 3,000 retail investors—and can help you uncover some fresh perspectives on your own financial mindset.

ssga-insights.title: Capture AI upside while managing Tech volatility
ssga-insights.description: Learn how balancing Tech exposure with allocations to Communication Services and Utilities may be a more resilient portfolio strategy to navigate Tech volatility when investing in AI.

ssga-insights.title: Sustainability Data Governance and Oversight in Asset Management
ssga-insights.description: In this piece, we discuss how we assess the robustness, correctness, precision, and trustworthiness of our sustainability data.

ssga-insights.title: Three shifts reshaping Technology—and portfolios
ssga-insights.description: Three shifts: rotation from Tech to old economy sectors; AI driven dispersion in Tech; and higher risk from Tech concentration are underscoring the value of diversification.
